creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 256071
Patch to update textproc/ibus

- Update to 1.5.31
- Add GTK4 option
- Enable by default GTK3, GTK4 and WAYLAND options (disable GTK2)
- Remove reference to KDE4 in pkg-message

Note: Wayland is enabled by default in x11-toolkits/gtk30 and x11-toolkits/gtk40
